Usage: gaia review [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Reviewer tooling вЂ” package / node / calibration / manifest / status / red-team
 / diff / gate / query / report.

в”‚ package      Run comprehensive package review (inquiry + trace +             в”‚
в”‚              calibration).                                                   в”‚
в”‚ node         Review a single node вЂ” filter diagnostics to one                в”‚
в”‚              claim/strategy/operator.                                        в”‚
в”‚ calibration  Run calibration audit вЂ” compute О” = posterior - prior, rank by  в”‚
в”‚              |О”|.                                                            в”‚
в”‚ status       Show a quick read-only status overview for a Gaia package.      в”‚
в”‚ red-team     Run adversarial review over a package, node, or solution        в”‚
в”‚              artifact.                                                       в”‚
в”‚ diff         Run semantic diff against a previous inquiry review snapshot.   в”‚
в”‚ gate         Run a composed review gate and return pass/warning/error        в”‚
в”‚              status.                                                         в”‚
в”‚ query        Run a structured query over review artifacts.                   в”‚
в”‚ report       Render a human-readable package review report.                  в”‚
в”‚ manifest     Review and update action audit records (list / show / accept /  в”‚
в”‚              reject / needs-inputs).                                         в”‚
